research_tracing_patterns.overview: Common patterns for tracing features and data flows in the HRM codebase. Use these as starting templates when investigating specific areas.

pattern.name: end_to_end_feature_trace
pattern.description: Trace a feature from the UI component down to the database query and back

steps.step: Identify the Vue component in hrm_FE/src/components/ or hrm_FE/src/views/
Find the API calls the component makes — look for imports from src/apis/
Read the API module to find the endpoint URL and HTTP method
Locate the matching FastAPI router in hrm_BE/ (match by URL path)
In the router, identify the query registry key or service function called
Read the query file in hrm_BE/app/queries/ to see the actual SQL
Note the response shape and how the frontend processes it

pattern.output_format: Present as a numbered flow: 1. Component → API function → Endpoint → Query key → SQL → Response handling

pattern.name: query_registry_lookup
pattern.description: Find and understand a specific query registry entry

steps.step: Search for the query key string across hrm_BE/app/queries/
Read the query function to understand parameters and SQL
Search for usages of the key in router/service files
Identify which frontend API module calls the endpoint that uses this key

pattern.name: permission_flow_trace
pattern.description: Understand how permissions control access to a feature

steps.step: Check the Vue Router config in hrm_FE/src/router/index.ts for route meta permissions
Check the permission store in hrm_FE/src/stores/permissionStore.js
Check the backend route for auth dependencies (Depends on current_user, permission checks)
Trace how the permission code is loaded during login

pattern.name: component_dependency_map
pattern.description: Map all dependencies of a Vue component

steps.step: Read the component's imports (other components, composables, stores, APIs, utilities)
Identify Element Plus components used in the template
List Pinia stores accessed
List API functions called
Note any worker usage (useDataWorker, useExcelExport)

pattern.name: cross_module_pattern_comparison
pattern.description: Compare how a pattern is implemented across multiple modules

steps.step: Identify 3-5 representative modules that use the pattern
Read the relevant section of each module
Create a comparison table showing similarities and differences
Note any deviations from the dominant pattern

pattern.output_format: Present as a markdown table with columns for each module and rows for each aspect of the pattern.

pattern.name: batch_operation_trace
pattern.description: Trace a batch/bulk operation from frontend to backend

steps.step: Find the component that initiates the batch (look for batch submit buttons or bulk actions)
Identify the API call and payload structure
Find the backend endpoint handling the batch
Understand the transaction behavior (all-or-nothing vs partial success)
Check the response structure (success/inserted/failed counts)
